====Pokémon====
=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Vibrava
|stage1=Trapinch
|type1=Ground
|type2=Dragon
|img=Hugh Trapinch Adventures.png
|img2=Hugh Vibrava Adventures.png
|epnum=PS525
|epname=The Transfer Student
|desc={{p|Vibrava}} is Hugh's first known Pokémon. As a {{p|Trapinch}}, it was used to battle [[Leo]]'s {{p|Deino}} at the Aspertia City Trainers' School. It won, but it was then defeated by [[Blake's Dewott]] afterwards. Sometime before going to Pokéstar Studios, Trapinch evolved into a Vibrava.

Vibrava's known moves are {{m|Sonic Boom}}, {{m|Dragon Breath}}, and {{m|Sandstorm}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Pidove
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Hugh Pidove Adventures.png
|epnum=PS531
|epname=Unforgettable Memories
|desc={{p|Pidove}} is Hugh's second known Pokémon. It was given to Hugh by his grandfather, along with a {{p|Tynamo}} and a {{p|Purrloin}}. It was first used to battle a group of {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s at the Aspertia Trainers' School. It used {{m|Bestow}} to give a Grunt's {{p|Klang}} a [[Choice Band]], preventing it from using any move other than {{m|Protect}}.

Pidove's only known move is {{m|Bestow}} and its Ability is {{a|Super Luck}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Eelektross
|stage1=Tynamo
|stage2=Eelektrik
|type1=Electric
|img=Hugh Tynamo Adventures.png
|img2=Hugh Eelektross Adventures.png
|epnum=PS531
|epname=Unforgettable Memories
|desc={{p|Eelektross}} is Hugh's third known Pokémon. It was given to to Hugh as a {{p|Tynamo}} by his grandfather, along with a {{p|Pidove}} and a {{p|Purrloin}}. Sometime prior to ''[[PS543|Abyssal Ruins]]'', it evolved into an Eelektross. It was used to battle a group of {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s that came to attack [[Rood]].

Eelektross's only known move is {{m|Crush Claw}} and its Ability is {{a|Levitate}}.}}

=====Given away=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh's sister
|pkmn=Purrloin
|type1=Dark
|img=Hugh sister Purrloin Adventures.png
|img_size=150px
|epnum=PS531
|epname=Unforgettable Memories
|desc={{p|Purrloin}} is a Pokémon Hugh got for his sister's birthday. Although it wouldn't listen to him, the Purrloin listened to his sister perfectly. Later, it was stolen by Team Plasma, fueling Hugh's hatred for the group.

Purrloin's only known move is {{m|Scratch}}.}}

=====Temporary=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Jigglypuff
|type1=Normal
|img=Choral Competition Adventures.png
|epnum=PS534
|epname=Choir Tournament
|desc=This {{p|Jigglypuff}} was partnered with Hugh during the [[Autumn Choir Tournament]]. Together, they performed in Team Jigglypuff and faced off against other students. In the finals, Team Jigglypuff faced off against Team {{p|Sawsbuck}}, but eventually came out on top.

Jigglypuff's known moves are {{m|Sing}} and {{m|Hyper Voice}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|main=Foongy
|trainer=Whitley
|nick=Foongy
|pkmn=Foongus
|gender=male
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Whitley Foongy.png
|epnum=PS524
|epname=A Difficult Parting
|desc={{p|Foongus|Foongy}} (Japanese: '''ダケちゃん''' ''Dake-chan'') is a Pokémon belonging to {{adv|Whitley}}. During their raid on the [[Plasma Frigate]], Foongy decided to stay behind and help Hugh fight a pair of Plasma Grunts.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Team Plasma
|pkmn=Snivy
|type1=Grass
|img=Team Plasma Snivy Adventures.png
|epnum=PS547
|epname=The Final Battle
|desc={{p|Snivy}} was a Pokémon liberated by [[Team Plasma]]. It was sent to battle Hugh on the Plasma Frigate, but it refused to fight and instead sided with him.

Snivy's only known move is {{m|Grass Pledge}}.}}
